calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES ON APPEAL AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT THEREOF
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT NICOLE DOBARRO'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES ON APPEAL

Appearances via Zoom:
Angie Guevara of the DeVito Law Group (415.888.8215) for Nicole Dobarro;
Ryan Greenspan of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani (415.986.5900, rgreenspan@grsm.com) specially appearing for Queens SF, LLC;
Edward Kim (562.665.9990, eddokim@gmail.com) appearing via Zoom in propria persona

This matter is called together with the following cases:
CGC-24-617683, Queens SF, LLC v. Nicole Dobarro
CPF-25-518895, Nicole Dobarro v. Queens SF, LLC

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as moot. By companion order, the court has consolidated this action with Queens SF LLC v. Dobarro, CGC-24-617683, and Dobarro v. Queens SF, LLC, CPF-25-518895, and resolves the fee motion in the lead case, Queens SF LLC v. Dobarro, CGC-24-617683. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees On Appeal And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NICOLE DOBARRO's Motion For Attorneys Fees On Appeal.

Transferred to be heard in Department 301 on the same date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
